text.tspan: UNPRECEDENTED
@unhappychoice pushes 673 commits, 41k added lines, 20k removed in a single sprint
SOURCES SAY
@unhappychoice merges 58 PRs, 8 of them in steamfetch alone
KEYBOARD ON FIRE
@unhappychoice bumps jest 30.4.0 to 30.4.2, risking 4298 lines of chaos
JUST IN
@unhappychoice releases splashboard v2.4.0 with GitLab pipeline status support
DEVELOPING
@unhappychoice reviews 69 PRs, keeping every repo clean and secure
